pluginDesc.message: Manage localStorage, sessionStorage, and cookies easily

confirmClearCurrentType.message: Clear all data for the current storage type? This cannot be undone.

confirmClearPage.message: Clear localStorage, sessionStorage, and cookies for this page? This cannot be undone.

confirmOverwriteAll.message: Overwrite all {storageType} data? This cannot be undone.

modalBatchEditHelp.message: Edit {storageType} data. Saving will overwrite all current {storageType} data.

messageAllPageDataCleared.message: Cleared all data for the current page

messageBatchSaveFailedRollback.message: Batch save failed. Original data has been restored.

messageClipboardEmpty.message: Clipboard is empty. Copy some JSON data first.

messageClipboardNotSupported.message: Your browser does not support the Clipboard API. Please copy data manually.

messageClearPartialFailed.message: Some data could not be cleared: {types}

messageDuplicateKeys.message: Duplicate keys found: "{keys}". These keys already exist in {storageType}. Adjust the data before pasting, or use batch edit to overwrite existing data.

messageInvalidClipboardJson.message: Invalid JSON. Check the clipboard contents.

messageInvalidDataFormat.message: Invalid data format. Check the data and try again.

messageInvalidJsonData.message: Invalid JSON: enter valid JSON data.

messageInvalidJsonEditor.message: Invalid JSON. Check the editor error in the lower-right corner.

messageInvalidJsonObject.message: Pasted data must be a JSON object, for example: {example}

messageJsonObjectEmpty.message: JSON object is empty. Nothing to paste.

messageKeyExists.message: Key "{key}" already exists. Edit the existing item or choose another key.

messageNoClipboardAccess.message: No clipboard permission. Allow clipboard access or reinstall the extension.

messagePastePartial.message: Pasted {success}/{total} items. Some items may have failed.

messageSaveFailedInvalidJson.message: Save failed: data is not valid JSON

messageValueSavedAsStringFailed.message: Invalid JSON. Check the editor error in the lower-right corner.

validationKeyValueNotSerializable.message: Value for key "{key}" cannot be serialized as JSON: {message}
